items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: A standard project takes 4 to 12 weeks depending on the complexity and scope.

items.question: Do you offer post-launch support?
items.answer: Yes, we provide continuous maintenance, monitoring, and feature updates.

items.question: Will I own the source code?
items.answer: Absolutely. You retain 100% intellectual property and code ownership upon completion.
